channel.title: Extensibility on Systology
channel.description: Recent content in Extensibility on Systology

item.title: Chowist
item.description: A decade-spanning food discovery app that migrated from Ruby Sinatra → Rails → Django while staying current with tooling, dependencies, and best practices. Lessons from incremental framework migration and maintaining a single codebase through language/ecosystem shifts.

item.title: Extensibility & Plugin Architecture
item.description: Guidelines for plugin architectures, stable APIs, cross-language bindings, and safe extension points.

item.title: Grit
item.description: From‑scratch Git implementation in Rust focusing on object storage, performance, and plumbing/porcelain command compatibility.

item.title: Photohaul
item.description: Java tool for organizing and migrating large photo collections with deduplication, metadata preservation, and resumable jobs.

item.title: Video Analysis
item.description: Two approaches to multimodal video feature extraction — Apple-native (Vision, AVFoundation, Core Image) vs. cross-platform C++/Python (OpenCV, pybind11) for ML preprocessing.

item.title: Web App
item.description: Guiding principles for production-ready web apps (12-factor-inspired): scaling, static/media handling, background work, CI/CD, and observability.
